data.body: Seventh review BLOCK remediation: accepted duplicate blockers fb754cc667f9311ce/f823bfd52950c701b by naming the exact VerifyConfig field and _SECTIONS['verify'] coercer registration. Accepted ff57f08a9cc2a6da5 by correcting existing claim/reuse routing language. Accepted f617026a23c8912bd/fca4d743b62dccb09 by defining None/empty legacy semantics and non-raising stale-pin-missing plus structured warnings for unreadable targets. Accepted caller/rollback/test-coverage advisories by enumerating every current compute_validity caller, named-key compatibility, DRIFT_REFRESH restoration, resign.py ownership, and focused proving test files. Rerunning before downstream review.
